risk_tolerance.football_terms: Shifts calls between safer underneath answers and higher-leverage stress calls.
risk_tolerance.ai_terms: Adjusts the policy's willingness to choose higher-variance legal actions.

adaptation_speed.football_terms: Controls how quickly the coordinator answers a repeated front, shell, or coverage stress.
adaptation_speed.ai_terms: Lowers or raises the evidence count needed before changing the policy path.

screen_trigger_confidence.football_terms: Sets how quickly the offense calls screens when it reads pressure looks.
screen_trigger_confidence.ai_terms: Changes the belief threshold for selecting the screen counter route.

explosive_shot_tolerance.football_terms: Sets how much the offense accepts volatile downfield-shot attempts.
explosive_shot_tolerance.ai_terms: Gates high-variance pass concepts when legal action and game state allow them.

run_pass_tendency.football_terms: Declares whether the offense leans pass, run-to-play-action, balanced, or constraint-heavy.
run_pass_tendency.ai_terms: Selects the policy branch that prioritizes concept families before reactive counters.

disguise_sensitivity.football_terms: Controls how often the defense answers with late movement and simulated pressure.
disguise_sensitivity.ai_terms: Weights observed offensive stress toward disguise-heavy policy branches.

pressure_frequency.football_terms: Sets how often the defense escalates from coverage calls into pressure looks.
pressure_frequency.ai_terms: Changes the threshold for selecting true or simulated pressure actions.

counter_repeat_tolerance.football_terms: Controls how long the defense waits before repeating bracket or front counters.
counter_repeat_tolerance.ai_terms: Adjusts the count gate for reusing counter actions against visible tendencies.
